artPrompt: A widescreen noir film-still of an endless ledger-chain scene: shadowed goblin figures in a smoke-filled back room linked by faint glowing strands of debt passing hand to hand, each shaking on a deal under a single hanging amber lamp, the strands tangling outward into ink-black depth; cigar haze and damp brick frame the ritual of obligation, intimate and inescapable, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Everybody Owes Everybody
text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, target opponent gains 1 life and you create a Favor token. The ledger only ever grows.
Whenever you sacrifice a Favor token, you gain 1 life. The house keeps a cut of every collection.
flavorText: In Whateverville, debt is the only currency that never inflates and never forgives.
